title: RL-005 Phase 1.5+2 Execution Plan — Plugin Security State Refactor
consumer_purpose: Unify parallel hooks[]/registrations[] arrays into plugins: PluginRegistration[], eliminate TOCTOU in trigger(), fix bus subscriber staleness, and switch capability denial logs to Effect.logWarning/logError per RL-005 revision 3
claim_atoms: 1. State.hooks[] and State.registrations[] unified into State.plugins: PluginRegistration[]. 2. PluginRegistration extended with hooks: Hooks and pluginName: string fields. 3. Trigger() snapshots plugins at top of call to prevent TOCTOU. 4. Bus subscriber reads InstanceState.get(state) per event instead of closure capture. 5. Capability denials logged via yield* Effect.logWarning. 6. Hook errors logged via Effect.logError in catch handlers (non-yield context — safe fallback). 7. All downstream consumers remain compatible (Interface types unchanged). 8. Gates 2 (tool namespace) and 3 (config stripSecrets) confirmed fully implemented — no changes needed.
